ead.archdesc:
======= RMM08568Diane Scrima Collection of Recipe Booklets and Cookbooks8568Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
September 20162B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
humecThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:11:22 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Diane Scrima Collection of Recipe Booklets and Cookbooks
Scrima, Diane J.
8568
.6 cubic feet. .6 cubic feet.
1936-1983. Publications. The collection primarily consists of recipe pamphlets and cookbooks produced by General Foods, with a few by other corporations. Collection material in English. 9672110
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
September 2016
EAD encoding:
Jude Corina, September 2016
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Diane Scrima worked for General Foods Corporation for 26 years.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
The collection primarily consists of recipe pamphlets and cookbooks produced by General Foods, with a few by other corporations.
SERIES LIST
Series I. By General Foods Box 1
Series II. By Other Corporations Box 2
Cite As:
Diane Scrima Collection of Recipe Booklets and Cookbooks, #8568. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
RELATED MATERIALS
Related material in collection #8006, Food and recipe booklets collection.
Cookbooks. Recipes. Formulas, recipes, etc. Cooking, American. Cooking. General Foods Corporation
